mapper.select: WITH SOURCE AS (SELECT TBCI.ID, CASE WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '30' THEN '货转' WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '50' THEN '混配' when TBCI.SOURCE = '20' then '集港' when tbci.SOURCE = '10' then '卸船' ELSE COALESCE(TBCI.IS_TOS, CASE WHEN TBT.TYPE = '拆箱集港' THEN '集港' ELSE TBT.TYPE END) END "source" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID), STORAGE_RATE AS (SELECT TBCC.COMPANY_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.START_TIME, TBC.END_TIME, TBCR.CARGO_CODE, TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON (TBC.STATUS = '20' AND TBCC.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID) JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON (TBCR.TYPE = '10' AND TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240' AND TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID) GROUP BY TBCC.COMPANY_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.START_TIME, TBC.END_TIME, TBCR.CARGO_CODE, TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS ORDER BY TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS DESC) SELECT SOURCE."source", TBCI.ID, TRUNC(NVL2(TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.REAL_CLEAR_DATE, SYSDATE) - CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END - CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN MIN(STORAGE_RATE.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) WHEN '集港' THEN MIN(STORAGE_RATE.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS END, 0) "overdueDays", CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN MIN(STORAGE_RATE.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) WHEN '集港' THEN MIN(STORAGE_RATE.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS END "freeDays", TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, MC.SIGN, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, CASE WHEN TBCI.CARGO_NAME = '石油焦' OR MCC.CARGO_TYPE_NAME IN ('木材', '粮食', '化肥农药') THEN '件' ELSE TO_CHAR (TBCI.PACKING_NAME) END "workTypeLabel",mcc.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME,MCC.CARGO_TYPE_NAME, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TDS.SHIP_NAME ||'_'||TDSI.VOYAGE shipNameVoyage, TDS.SCN, TDS.BERTH_TIME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE, WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt", TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE, TBCMR.MIX_TIME, TBCI.CLEAR_BY_NAME, TBCI.REAL_CLEAR_DATE, TBT.TRUST_NO, TBT.RELEASE_TIME, TBCI.COMPANY_ID, TBCI.COMPANY_NAME, TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, to_date(TO_CHAR ( ( case when TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID IS not NULL then TMPTCSS.maxTime else to_date(to_char(sysdate,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') end - TRUNC(NVL2(TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.REAL_CLEAR_DATE, SYSDATE) - CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END - CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN MIN(STORAGE_RATE.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) WHEN '集港' THEN MIN(STORAGE_RATE.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS END, 0) * INTERVAL '1' DAY ), 'yyyy-MM-dd' ),'yyyy-MM-dd') over_date, TBCI.IS_CLEAR,tbci.CREATE_TIME, decode (TBT3.TBT_TYPE, '装船', '倒运', '卸船', '倒运', TBT3.TBT_TYPE) FLOW_DIRECTION, CASE WHEN TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID IS NOT NULL THEN DECODE(TCSS.IS_FINAL, '0', '20', '1', '30') ELSE '10' END settle_status FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN SOURCE ON (TBCI.ID = SOURCE.ID AND SOURCE."source" IN ('卸船', '集港', '货转', '混配')) LEFT JOIN (SELECT CARGO_INFO_ID, MAX(IS_FINAL) IS_FINAL FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE GROUP BY CARGO_INFO_ID) TCSS ON TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID JOIN M_CARGO MC ON (MC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = MC.CARGO_CODE) left join M_CARGO_CATEGORY MCC on MC.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = MCC.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE left join ( select TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID, sum(TCSSD.AMOUNT) AMOUNT, max(TCSS.IS_FINAL) is_final, MAX(TCSS.CONTRACT_ID) CONTRACT_ID, max(tcss.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, max(TCS.REVIEW_TIME) review_time, to_date ( to_char (min(TCSSD."DATE"), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) minTime, to_date ( to_char (MAX(TCSSD."DATE"), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) maxTime from T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS left join T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD on TCSS.ID = TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID left join T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD2 on TCSD2.BUSINESS_ID = TCSS.ID left join T_COST_STATEMENT TCS on TCS.id = TCSD2.STATEMENT group by TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID ) TMPTCSS on TMPTCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID = tbci.id left join ( select TBCI3.ID, REGEXP_REPLACE( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR (decode (T.TYPE, '装船', '倒运', '卸船', '倒运', T.TYPE)), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY decode (T.TYPE, '装船', '倒运', '卸船', '倒运', T.TYPE) ), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) TBT_TYPE, sum(T.PLAN_TON) PLAN_TON from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI3 join T_BUS_TRUST T on TBCI3.TRUST_ID = T.ID group by TBCI3.ID ) TBT3 on TBT3.ID = TBCI.ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT) "minWeighOutDt" FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) WEIGH_JG ON TBCI.ID = WEIGH_JG.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR ON TBCI.ID = TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CUSTOMER TBCUSTOMER ON TBCUSTOMER.ID = TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN STORAGE_RATE ON (TBCI.COMPANY_ID = STORAGE_RATE.COMPANY_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = STORAGE_RATE.CUSTOMER_ID AND (CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END) >= STORAGE_RATE.START_TIME AND (CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END) < STORAGE_RATE.END_TIME AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = STORAGE_RATE.CARGO_CODE) WHERE TBCI.IS_SETTLE_STORAGE = '1' AND TBCUSTOMER.IS_STATIONS = '0' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE where IS_FINAL ='1' GROUP BY CARGO_INFO_ID) WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID) GROUP BY SOURCE."source", TBCI.ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID,mcc.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME,MCC.CARGO_TYPE_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, MC.SIGN, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, MC.WORK_TYPE, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TDS.SHIP_NAME, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDS.SCN, TDS.BERTH_TIME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE, WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt", TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE, TBCMR.MIX_TIME, TBCI.CLEAR_BY_NAME, TBCI.REAL_CLEAR_DATE, TBT.TRUST_NO, TBT.RELEASE_TIME, TBCI.COMPANY_ID, TBCI.COMPANY_NAME, TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS,TBCI.PACKING_NAME, TBCI.IS_CLEAR,tbci.CREATE_TIME,TBT3.TBT_TYPE, CASE WHEN TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID IS NOT NULL THEN DECODE(TCSS.IS_FINAL, '0', '20', '1', '30') ELSE '10' END,TMPTCSS.maxTime ,TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID

SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, CONTRACT_ID, RATE, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, AMOUNT, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_BY_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, IS_USE_REDUCE, IS_FINAL, REDUCE_AMOUNT FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID IN
#{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

WITH SOURCE AS (SELECT TBCI.ID, CASE WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '30' THEN '货转' WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '50' THEN '混配'
when TBCI.SOURCE = '20' then '集港' when tbci.SOURCE = '10' then '卸船' ELSE COALESCE(TBCI.IS_TOS, CASE WHEN TBT.TYPE = '拆箱集港' THEN '集港' ELSE TBT.TYPE END) END "source" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID) SELECT TBCI.ID "cargoInfoId", TBC.ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO "contractNo", TBCR.ID "contractRateId", DECODE(SOURCE."source", '货转', GREATEST(TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, 0), '混配', TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) "freeStorageDays", TBCR.RATE, TBCR.TAX, SFB.FILE_ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN SOURCE ON TBCI.ID = SOURCE.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT) "minWeighOutDt" FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) WEIGH_JG ON TBCI.ID = WEIGH_JG.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR ON TBCI.ID = TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC ON TBCI.COMPANY_ID = TBCC.COMPANY_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON (TBC.STATUS = '20' AND TBCC.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID AND TBCI.COMPANY_ID = TBCC.COMPANY_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID AND
to_date(to_char(#{date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') >= to_date(to_char(TBC.START_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_date(to_char(#{date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mm:ss'),'yyyy-MM-dd') <= to_date(to_char(TBC.END_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd')
to_date(to_char(CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END ,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd')>= to_date(to_char(TBC.START_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_date(to_char(CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END ,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd')<= to_date(to_char(TBC.END_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd')
) JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON (TBCR.TYPE = '10' AND TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240' AND TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = TBCR.CARGO_CODE) LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TBC.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID WHERE TBCI.ID IN
#{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY TBC.CREATE_TIME DESC
select TBC.ID from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI join T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC on TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID where TBC.ID is not null and TBCI.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select distinct TBC.ID from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI join T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC on TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID join T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC on (TBCI.COMPANY_ID = TBCC.COMPANY_ID and TBCC.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID) where TBC.ID is not null and TBCI.id = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and TBC.ID in
#{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

WITH SOURCE AS (SELECT TBCI.ID, CASE WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '30' THEN '货转' WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '50' THEN '混配'
when TBCI.SOURCE = '20' then '集港' when tbci.SOURCE = '10' then '卸船' ELSE COALESCE(TBCI.IS_TOS, CASE WHEN TBT.TYPE = '拆箱集港' THEN '集港' ELSE TBT.TYPE END) END "source" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID) SELECT distinct TBC.ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN SOURCE ON TBCI.ID = SOURCE.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT) "minWeighOutDt" FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) WEIGH_JG ON TBCI.ID = WEIGH_JG.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR ON TBCI.ID = TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON (TBC.STATUS = '20' and TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID AND CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END >= TBC.START_TIME AND CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END <= TBC.END_TIME ) WHERE TBC.ID is not null and TBCI.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select distinct TBCR.ID from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI left join T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC on TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID left join T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR on( TBCR.TYPE = '10' AND TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240' AND TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = TBCR.CARGO_CODE) where TBCR.ID is not null and TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and TBC.id IN
#{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
